eletal frame. (b) Close-up view of spherical 5-bar differential showing poor alignment. Description Model 01 d utilizes a spherical 5-bar differential. Without the wing: First resonance found at ~270 Hz and next at ~450Hz. At 1st resonance, flapping

Hz and next at ~450Hz. At 1st resonance, flapping gain was ~5 deg/V (input 0-6V => output 30 deg motion). Q=~14 Adding a 1.5mg, 15mm long wing: First resonance found at ~68 Hz and next at ~310 Hz. At 1st resonance, flapping gain was ~0.83 deg/V (inpu

1st resonance, flapping gain was ~0.83 deg/V (input 0-60V => output 50 deg motion). Q=~2.3 The amplitude for rotation was pretty bad (no measurement... just observation). Parameter Value Final wing length, l 13mm Quality Factor, Q 2.3
